title: Tennis Serve: 3 Ways Not to be Stupid
description:
A Youtube Poop Tennis serve for MexicanSunflower!  He edits this video and posts it, then I edit his video, then he edits mine again... hilarity ensues.

Dang, Youtube messed up the sound sync at the end of the video again... oh well, next time I'll make sure every mmmmmmmmm is timed precisely to the millisecond!
